movie.title: King Xian's The Worm Valley of Ghost Blowing Lamp (2023) [Hindi ORG] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Adapted from the 3rd volume in the novel series “Candle in the Tomb” by Zhang Mu Ye. Hu Bayi, Wang Kaixuan, and Shiely Yang, infected with a curse, embark on a journey to King Xian’s tomb to retrieve the Haochen Bead and break the curse. They face ancient organs, ghostly visions, explosive bugs, and a massive salamander.
